name: Kirk Cousins
title: NFL Quarterback
bio: American professional football quarterback who has played for the Washington Commanders, Minnesota Vikings, and Atlanta Falcons.
faith: An outspoken Christian who has said, 'The gospel changes everything. It changes how I see football, how I see my marriage, how I see money.' He has spoken at churches and men's conferences about his faith.

videos.title: Kirk Cousins: Living as an Ambassador for Christ
videos.note: Focus on the Family — living as an ambassador for Christ. 95K views

videos.title: Kirk Cousins Sits Down for an Honest Conversation About Faith, Family, and Football

sources.title: Kirk Cousins — Faith and Football
sources.note: Cousins speaking about his faith at churches and events

tagline: An NFL quarterback who studies Scripture as diligently as game film
